name: JellyFusion
description: All-in-one Jellyfin plugin: Netflix-style slider with auto-trailers (TMDB), quality badges (4K/HDR/LAT/SUB/NUEVO/KID), studios section, theme switcher (Netflix, Prime, Disney+, Apple TV+, Crunchyroll, Paramount+) and Discord/Telegram notifications.
overview: Combines Editor's Choice and JellyTag into a single unified plugin with multi-language support (es/en/pt/fr).

versions.changelog: Initial release — Editor's Choice slider with TMDB trailers, JellyTag badges (LAT/SUB/NUEVO/KID), Studios section, Theme switcher (6 themes), Discord & Telegram notifications, multi-language UI (es/en/pt/fr).
